subcodes.first_line: O companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! For a time thou didst associate and consort with 'Abdu'l-Bahá, and didst observe the conduct and behavior of this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همنشین عبدالبهاء مدتی قرین و همنشین عبدالبهاء بودی و روش و حرکت این بنده
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
